name: gps-tracking-app
description: Full-stack GPS tracking application with backend and frontend

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
